revision.comment: Adding "itvstart" as a class, which is needed for Infobox television date validation

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1279926643|1279926643]] by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) bloody hell, the two of us have a ridiculous ability to edit-conflict (module updated two minutes ago)
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Date time|generate_date}}<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using start date with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Start date]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | df }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
